title: This BingX SpotLight recap shows a +75k USDT daily profit - Is "Value HODLing" the meta for 2026?
author: thienpro2
selftext:
I saw a shared recap from the BingX event showing a trader hitting over +75,500 USDT in profit on a single day. Interestingly, the AI Master analyzed their style and labeled them "Crypto Buffett" (Value HODLer), advising them to look for the "Coca-Cola of crypto."

It raises a good point about strategy. While many of us chase quick scalps, this data suggests that big position sizing and holding (the Buffett way) might be where the real gains are. Has anyone else checked their AI persona yet?
